refund_policy.policy_text: Pro-rated refund: if you cancel before end of billing cycle, you receive refund for remaining unused portion of service.
conditions: must cancel before billing cycle end

sla.sla_text: $1 per blacklisted IP financial guarantee verified via Pixelscan. If IP is flagged by blacklists at delivery, you get credit/refund per IP.

affiliate_program.notes: Has cashback program rather than traditional affiliate commission

notes: Founded 2022, USA. Backed by Multilogin founders. Quality-first approach with real-time IP filtering. $3.99/mo starting. Pixelscan guarantee is unique differentiator.
